use std::ffi::CString;

fn open_path(path: &str) {
    let c_path = CString::new(path).unwrap();
    unsafe {
        libc::open(c_path.as_ptr(), libc::O_RDONLY);
    }
}

fn create_file(path: &str) -> i32 {
    let c_path = CString::new(path).expect("path contains null byte");
    unsafe { libc::open(c_path.as_ptr(), libc::O_CREAT | libc::O_WRONLY, 0o644) }
}
